problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
